name: Advanced Diagnosis Phase 9 - Specialty-Specific Scoring and Curated Rubric Templates
new_features: specialty module selection now boosts module-relevant differential diagnoses
module-specific warning diagnoses get stronger priority when matching red flags are present
specialty bonus and reasons are shown inside differential cards
curated rubric templates are added per specialty module and extracted findings
specialty scoring metadata is saved in ADX case records
note: Specialty scoring is a prioritization aid only; doctor must confirm diagnosis, red flags, tests and rubrics.
